{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112320106BEC04AE4B13E9CEB7D"}"},"total":19},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604005192347157310","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好刺激啊[爱慕]好看 爱看 多看[舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770448322,"group_id":"7597698387059674174","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7TrUZ+581t/QNPUnhK70YA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"202788504090734","user_name":"燕京市的美国队长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"202788504090734","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597698387059674174","book_info":{"abstract":"你失去了记忆，坠入了一个平行-火影世界，与此同时你的身体绑定了一个系统，只要你能够获得目标人物的100%爱意，便会给你记忆碎片。但凡任务失败，你便会以黑户的身份流亡在这个未知的世界，从而为系统达成人口KPI贡献一份力。而系统通过过往的数据分析后，判定没有一个人类能将任务与感情割裂开来，也没有人能够毫无负担地在同一个世界不断地攻略新的人物。
可是，你是例外。你似乎在失去了记忆的同时，失去了对于感情的感知以及对于道德的自缚。所以你能够在攻略进度达到100%后，直接投身于下一段感情。而那些被你攻略的目标人物竟是一个个地生病了……天之骄子变成了舔狗，变成了痴汉，变成了让你呼之即来挥之即去的存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob590c00ac4f154c83191b405da46e1f2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"被死鱼眼统治的一生","author_id":"","book_id":"7597698387059674174","book_name":"火影乙女：非常规玛丽苏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#90d0f0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3579人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7598356890724090430","read_count":"3579","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"147796"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"57","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,异世穿越,系统,二次元","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob590c00ac4f154c83191b405da46e1f2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251521&x-signature=KO8s08XZuPX8LrjIaEKoOpbgaGU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"619775493675624","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112320106BEC04AE4B13E9CEB7D"}"},"relate_info_list":[]
